project.title: Knowing Eye: A Full-Stack Session-Guided Web-Based Examination Platform Application with Integrated Behavior Monitoring System Using Facial and Postural Analysis via Computer Vision
project.description: A web-based examination platform with integrated computer vision monitoring that analyzes examinee behavior through facial and postural tracking in real time.

objectives.general: To design and develop a full-stack web-based examination platform integrated with computer vision-based behavioral monitoring to enhance examination integrity, efficiency, and reliability.

specific.description: Design and develop a centralized web-based examination platform.

sub: Manage examinee participation and exam flow

specific.description: Develop monitoring and data management system

sub: Detect facial presence and identity consistency
Track head movement, eye gaze, and posture
YOLO for face and posture detection
FaceNet or ArcFace for facial consistency

specific.description: Develop behavior monitoring and scoring module
sub: Support admin review of flagged events

specific.description: Evaluate system functionality, usability, and effectiveness

sources.custom: Recorded mock exam sessions with consent

overview.output: Behavioral reports, flagged anomalies, exam results

scope_of_study.description: Focuses on the development of a web-based examination platform with integrated behavioral monitoring using computer vision.
target_institutions: Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA)
scope_of_study.environment: Controlled academic testing environment with simulated exam sessions
functional_coverage: Data storage of logs and records
limitations: Behavioral indicators are not definitive cheating proof
